name: Cleanaway Waste Management Limited
analysis: EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$2.3525. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$2.3725 where 4 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$2.3525, stop A$2.2176, target A$2.4065. Risk/reward is 0.40:1.
